title: Women have lower risk of Endometriosis but normal risk for Endometrial Cancer, and more cogni...
summary: Women have lower risk of Endometriosis but normal risk for Endometrial Cancer, and more cognitive impairment with age.
detail: Men have zero risk, but can pass this on to their daughters. This is the normal version of Estrogen Receptor 1 (alpha). It has more cognitive decline than the rare version, with old women only remembering half as much details on the East Boston Memory Test immediate recall test.

title: Women have 10x risk of Endometriosis, but half the risk of Endometrial Cancer and 0.76x less...
summary: Women have 10x risk of Endometriosis, but half the risk of Endometrial Cancer and 0.76x less cognitive impairment.
detail: Men have zero risk, but can pass it on to daughters. Endometriosis means that womb tissue grows outside the womb. This SNP is a change in Estrogen Receptor 1 (alpha). It also lowers risk of cognitive impairment in aging women - on the East Boston Memory Test immediate recall test, women with this had about 1.5 to 2.0 times greater odds of remembering story elements.
whyItMatters: SNPedia has a genotype-specific page for this result, which can add consumer-facing context alongside primary evidence sources.
conditions: Men have zero risk, but can pass it on to daughters. Endometriosis means that womb tissue grows outside the womb. This SNP is a change in Estrogen Receptor 1 (alpha). It also lowers risk of cognitive impairment in aging women - on the East Boston Memory Test immediate recall test, women with this had about 1.5 to 2.0 times greater odds of remembering story elements.
Women have 10x risk of Endometriosis, but half the risk of Endometrial Cancer and 0.76x less cognitive impairment.
